node.text: Text reads "Galaxy S26 Ultra", "Own at 1,39,999", "Galaxy AI", and "SAMSUNG". Three Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra smartphones displayed at angles, showing distinctive large circular camera lens arrays on rear panels in purple/gray finish.
